pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take: **"The Noisemaker" Rafe is sittin' pretty at the top, runnin' his mouth like he's the next Johan Cruyff — but we all know he's one lucky son-of-a-gun with zero know-how.** He's flexin' 9 points like he's been puttin' in work on the training ground, but the reality is Rafe's teams just stumbled into points. Meanwhile, "Mustard Boy" Zach is dead last, probs 'cause he drafted Saudi Arabia thinkin' black gold meant goals — bless his heart. And "Ghost Pepper" Devin's findin' some spice with Spain and Norway, inchin' up to second place with 8 points. Then there's "Bubba G" Gunner, sittin' at fourth with 6 points, wonderin' why DR Congo ain't deliverin' like his barber promised. "The Backpass Assassin" Gayden better start hittin' the target and not just playin' it safe, or it's curtains for him sittin' on 7 points. Ain't none of y'all destined for glory at this rate — but keep tryin', 'cause this ain't over by a long shot.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G Confident DR Congo Will Thrive Against Portugal
pundit_takes.subtitle: Sources say Gunner trusts DR Congo like he trusts lottery tickets.

pundit_takes.headline: England Poised to Challenge Croatia as Backpass Assassin Smiles
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden believes England has mastered the art of going backwards.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy Hopes Ghana's Spice Tames Panama Heat
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach still thinks Ghana needs more mustard for a sure win.

pundit_takes.headline: Noisemaker Rafe Tops Standings, Shocks Experts Everywhere
pundit_takes.subtitle: Rafe claims strategic genius despite drafting three non-qualifiers.

rome_analytics_quotes: Rafe leads the pack with zero points today—crash and burn, wonder kid!
Rafe drafted non-qualifiers and still ranks first—kid's a wild card expert!
Gayden's only win is against his son—Thanksgiving just got awkward for the Backpass Assassin!
Sim's 17% for Rafe—teenager rewriting chaos theory while eating cereal, no big deal.
